texto: I'm not saying that owning a house makes life into some kind of blissful paradise
autor: simply that it makes the difference between freedom and enslavement.
explicacao: Citação de simply that it makes the difference between freedom and enslavement. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I'm not saying that owning a house makes life into some kind of blissful paradise” articula reflexao, tana-french, the-likeness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-likeness.
